criteria.name: Uses ER diagram
criteria.description: Uses Mermaid erDiagram syntax rather than a flowchart or class diagram.

criteria.name: Models all entities
criteria.description: Includes User, Diagram, and Review entities with clear names.

criteria.name: Correct cardinality
criteria.description: Represents User-to-Diagram as one-to-many, Diagram-to-Review as zero-or-more reviews, and each Review belonging to one User and one Diagram.

criteria.name: Assumptions note
criteria.description: Briefly states any assumptions without inventing unnecessary fields.
